tile_summary: Knowledge Work currently reflects a high-intake phase with a 13-item inbox dominated by agentic engineering resources, language immersion techniques (Mandarin Chinese and Vietnamese), productivity systems, second-brain architecture, and analyses of social media's cognitive costs. A single fresh workbench item tracks wiki health and status, while journal questions remain at zero. The pattern signals strong momentum in exploring Hermes agents, Textual reactive UIs, and study craft, creating an immediate opportunity for a synthesis pass that converts the incoming stream into durable patterns and clears processing debt.
